description:
On this episode, learn how PayGo leverages smart meters technology to enhance sustainability and increase customer satisfaction by helping them conserve energy. Chad Gates from PayGo explains how they built a highly available mobile enabled services on AWS to help customer use bar code technology to pay for their utilities and integrates it to their home with smart grid technology to reduce operational costs for the utility.
